title: Media Types, Content Codings, Character Encodings, and Source Identity · Contract Lens: Media Sniff Policy

Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use a documented media-type and conservative sniff policy while rejecting binary, multipart, and ambiguous content.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Media Sniff Policy model · Theory Media Sniff Po…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A page-looking URL guarantees an HTML response.
